contents.title: Introduction
contents.description: shadcn-docs-nuxt is a Nuxt documentation template built with Nuxt Content and shadcn-vue.

children.value: Indexed searching powered by Nuxt Content.
: Content made easy for Vue Developers.
: For the beautiful component & docs design.
: For the vue port of shadcn-ui & some docs component source.
: For inspiration & some docs component source.

contents.title: Markdown
contents.description: How to write docs with the MDC syntax.

children.value: Read the detailed MDC usage guide in the
is a VS Code extension that provides syntax highlighting and autocompletion for the MDC syntax.
, paste the following command, and press enter.

props.className: language-json shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark has-diff

children.value: Add nuxt-component-meta dependency to your project:
Add nuxt-component-meta to the modules section of your nuxt.config.ts and optionally configure the module:

Once your project has been built or running on the dev server, the extension will automatically scan your project for component metadata and provide suggestions based on the components discovered with zero additional configuration.
will hide the heading from toc.

contents.title: Pages
contents.description: Front matter attributes used in shadcn-docs-nuxt.

props.code:
---
title: Front Matter
description: Front matter attributes used in shadcn-docs-nuxt.
icon: lucide:book-type

navTruncate: false
navBadges:
  - value: New
    type: lime

badges:
  - value: Docus
    to: https://docus.dev/api/components#alert
    target: _blank
  - value: Source
    icon: lucide:code
    to: https://github.com/ZTL-UwU/shadcn-docs-nuxt/blob/main/components/content/Alert.vue
    target: _blank

authors:
  - name: Tony Zhang
    username: ZTL-UwU
    avatar: https://www.github.com/ZTL-UwU.png
    to: https://github.com/ZTL-UwU
    target: _blank
---

<!-- Content of the page -->

children.value: Front matter attributes used in shadcn-docs-nuxt.
Title of the page. Defaults to the filename.
Description of the page. Defaults to the first
Define if the page is included in the sidebar. Set it to
The icon shown in the sidebar for the page.
A list of badges appended to the end of the sidebar link.
Whether to truncate the sidebar title.
A list of badges shown at the bottom of page title.
A list of authors shown at the bottom of page title.
Whether to show the toc section for this page.
Whether to show the aside section for this page.
Whether to show the edit link for this page.
Whether to show the previous & next page buttons.
Whether to use the fullpage layout like the homepage.

contents.title: Home
contents.description: Starter for shadcn-docs-nuxt — Nuxt Content, search, and shadcn-vue out of the box.

children.value: Beautifully designed Nuxt Content template built with shadcn-vue.
Start from a free template and adapt it for your own documentation site.
Configure navigation, theme options, and project details from your app config.
Build docs with prose, docs, and page components designed for Markdown.
Give readers a responsive documentation experience across screen sizes.
Help users discover pages quickly with search powered by Nuxt Content.
Use familiar patterns from Docus, Nuxt UI Pro Docs, and undocs.
